International Award in the Field of “Materials Science” to Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan

Emeritus Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan, one of the faculty members of our Molecular Biology and Genetics department, was selected as the Most Promising Researcher of the Year in Asia in the field of “Materials Science” at the International Congress on Research Excellence 2024 (ICRE), organized with the contributions of The American Chamber of Research, International Journal for Science, Technology and Academic Research, The United Medical Council, World Research Council, Times of Research and Chronicles Time.

Congratulations to Prof. Pekcan.
